Maternal Child and Adolescent Health (MCAH)
Our Location:
1221 Fulton Street, Fresno CA 93721
Mailing:
PO Box 11867, Fresno CA 93775-1867
Phone:
(559) 600-3330
Fax:
(559) 455-4705
Hours:
Monday - Friday, 8:00am - 5:00pm
MCAH promotes healthy living for mothers and their families through programs for reproductive health, family planning, pregnancy, birth defects, infants, children, teens, and human stem cell research. Funding is provided through Title V, XIX (Medicaid), and State General Fund.
For more information on MCAH programs, visit
cdph.ca.gov
.
